_note: Media library content. Add entries below and commit — media.html renders them automatically. Videos are link-outs (no tracking embeds): swap the url to change a video, optionally swap the self-hosted thumb (CSP forbids hotlinking), set archived:true to move it to the archive panel. Audio files live in assets/media/audio/, photos in assets/media/img/.
